race.comment: LAUNCHER (4) broke his maiden last start over 1400m at Grafton, scoring by a head. Rises sharply in trip on the quick back-up and is well-placed to make it two on the bounce. PASS THE PEAK (8) has built nicely in his debut prep, putting it all together last start when getting off the mark at Ipswich over 1700m. Still has more to offer and should give backers a bold sight. ANDROS (1) showed good early dash and stalked the pace last start before drawing clear to score at Lismore. Has had a few more cracks than the rest but deserves respect nevertheless. CHIEF OF STAFF (3) hasn't been able to threaten in his last two when tackling tougher opposition but should find this easier. Worth noting he knocked off his maiden here just three runs ago.
